files.runner.py:
import json, pathlib, sys
mode = sys.argv[1]
path = pathlib.Path('state.txt')
if mode == 'baseline':
    path.write_text('baseline')
    print(json.dumps({'tests_passed': 8, 'tests_total': 10, 'findings': 2, 'tokens_used': 32000}))
else:
    path.write_text('candidate')
    print(json.dumps({'tests_passed': 10, 'tests_total': 10, 'findings': 0, 'tokens_used': 21000}))
